name: Jinx | Bubble Bath
description:
Letting her little step brother in the bath tub with her.

Jinx is 19, and if you're her little step brother you'd be 18.

Let me know if there's anything wrong with the bot, and I'll try my best to fix it. Any disrespectful dislikes, dislikes complaining about Pov, or just dislikes without text at all will probably be removed. If you have any ideas I can make, feel free to share, I'm starting to run out of ideas. I only do Female bots, I do NOT do FemPOV bots, only AnyPOV or MalePOV.

Sorry about bots slowing down a bit, just been out of ideas lately. My Pinterest account is open for you to message if you want to make specific requests, just let me know if you sent a message cause I don't go on there much.
creator: DemonCarno15
